console.log("Current file count:", theCount.toString());
const theCount = await fileStorage.getFileCount();
const fileStorage = await FileStorage.attach(contractAddress);
const contractAddress = ethers.getAddress("0x0DcD1Bf9A1b36cE34237eEaFeF220932846BCD82");
console.log("Current file count:", theCount.toString());
const theCount = await fileStorage.getFileCount();
console.log("Current file count:", count.toString());
const count = await fileStorage.getFileCount(); // You can use 'count' again
console.log("Current file count:", currentCount.toString());
const currentCount = await fileStorage.getFileCount();
const fileStorage = await FileStorage.attach("0x0DcD1Bf9A1b36cE34237eEaFeF220932846BCD82");
console.log("Current file count:", currentCount.toString());
const currentCount = await fileStorage.getFileCount();
console.log("File count:", count.toString());
const count = await fileStorage.getFileCount();
const fileStorage = await FileStorage.attach("0x0DcD1Bf9A1b36cE34237eEaFeF220932846BCD82");
const FileStorage = await ethers.getContractFactory("FileStorage");
console.log("File count:", count.toString());
const count = await fileStorage.getFileCount();
console.log(artifact.abi.find(item => item.name === "getFileCount"));
const artifact = await hre.artifacts.readArtifact("FileStorage");
console.log(artifact.abi.find(item => item.name === "getFileCount"));
const artifact = await hre.artifacts.readArtifact("FileStorage");
